candidates.why: Explicit COGS-related amortization row, but it appears as a component line directly beneath the selected parent bucket 'Cost of Revenues - Total', so adding it separately would risk double counting.
Explicit COGS-related depreciation row, but it appears as a component line within the selected parent bucket 'Cost of Revenues - Total', so it should not be added separately.

variables.notes: The selected COGS reference bucket is 'Cost of Revenues - Total'. The visible D&A rows for cost of revenues appear to be sub-components of that parent total, not separate same-level operating lines. Conservative treatment is to assume D&A is already embedded in the selected COGS bucket.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A-related depreciation row, but it is presented as a component under SG&A rather than a separate same-level operating expense outside the selected SG&A bucket.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Intangibles in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A-related amortization row, but it appears to be a component of SG&A and therefore already embedded in the selected SG&A bucket.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA_COMPONENTS bucket is the SG&A bucket excluding R&D. In the excerpt, depreciation and amortization in SG&A are shown as component lines under SG&A, so they should not be added separately. No separate R&D row or R&D amortization row is visible, so no special R&D adjustment applies.
